import React from 'react'; const CompressionControls = ({ compressionQuality, setCompressionQuality, targetSizeKB, setTargetSizeKB, onCompress, isCompressing, hasOriginalImage, hasCompressedImage }) => { return (
setCompressionQuality(parseFloat(e.target.value))} className="w-full h-2 bg-gray-200 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer accent-primary-600" />
Lower size Higher quality
setTargetSizeKB(e.target.value)} placeholder="e.g., 50, 100, 500" className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500 focus:border-transparent" />

Leave empty to use quality setting only

{!hasCompressedImage && ( )}
); }; export default CompressionControls;
